title: A Strange Concert
article_text: I went to a concert last week, and the location was near a big stone building. An actor performed on stage, and I was glad to see him. He sang a song about a murder in a city, which was opposite to the happy music I usually hear. A soldier in the audience began to blow a loud whistle, which increased the volume of the noise. I hate it when people do that at a show. The actor stopped and asked the soldier to proceed with his experiment, which was a strange request. I need to monitor the situation carefully, because the soldier might invest in a new finance plan. A sum of money was on the table, and I had to wash my hands before touching it. I like eggs, whereas my friend hates them, so we had a small problem. I will tape the whole event for later consideration.

sentences.en: I went to a concert last week, and the location was near a big stone building.
sentences.zh: 我上周去了一场音乐会，地点靠近一栋大石头建筑。

words.eng_def: a place where something is or happens
a hard, solid material found in the ground

sentences.en: An actor performed on stage, and I was glad to see him.
sentences.zh: 一位演员在舞台上表演，我很高兴见到他。

words.eng_def: a person who performs in plays or movies

sentences.en: He sang a song about a murder in a city, which was opposite to the happy music I usually hear.
sentences.zh: 他唱了一首关于城市里谋杀案的歌，这与我通常听到的快乐音乐相反。

sentences.en: A soldier in the audience began to blow a loud whistle, which increased the volume of the noise.
sentences.zh: 观众席上的一名士兵开始吹响响亮的哨子，增加了噪音的音量。

words.eng_def: a person who serves in an army
to push air out of the mouth
the loudness of a sound; the amount of space

sentences.en: I hate it when people do that at a show.
sentences.zh: 我讨厌人们在演出时那样做。

words.eng_def: to strongly dislike something or someone

sentences.en: The actor stopped and asked the soldier to proceed with his experiment, which was a strange request.
sentences.zh: 演员停下来，让士兵继续他的实验，这是一个奇怪的请求。

sentences.en: I need to monitor the situation carefully, because the soldier might invest in a new finance plan.
sentences.zh: 我需要仔细监控情况，因为士兵可能投资一个新的财务计划。

words.eng_def: to put money into something to make more money

sentences.en: A sum of money was on the table, and I had to wash my hands before touching it.
sentences.zh: 桌上有一笔钱，我必须在碰它之前洗手。

words.eng_def: an amount of money; the total
to clean something with water and soap

sentences.en: I like eggs, whereas my friend hates them, so we had a small problem.
sentences.zh: 我喜欢鸡蛋，而我的朋友讨厌它们，所以我们有点小问题。

words.eng_def: used to show a difference between two things

sentences.en: I will tape the whole event for later consideration.
sentences.zh: 我会把整个事件录下来供以后考虑。

words.eng_def: to record sound or video; a sticky strip
the act of thinking about something carefully

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a person who performs in plays or movies'?
What does 'monitor' mean as a verb?
